# LegacyShift | AI-Powered Legacy Modernization

> Ship 3× faster on legacy codebases without rewrites.

## Core Services
- AI-Powered Codebase Audits
- Custom AI Integration Blueprints
- Guided Workflow Implementation
- Cycle Time & Developer Satisfaction Optimization

## The Process (4 Weeks)
1. **Week 1: Codebase Deep Dive** - Mapping architecture and friction points.
2. **Week 2: AI Integration Blueprint** - Custom strategy for embedding tools into CI/CD.
3. **Week 3: Guided Implementation** - Live pair programming and real-time knowledge transfer.
4. **Week 4: Measure & Optimize** - Data-driven fine-tuning ofPR throughput.

## Technical Stats
- 68% Reduction in boilerplate time.
- 3.2× Faster PR turnaround.
- 50% Faster onboarding for engineers.
- 91% Developer satisfaction.
